channel.title: Jiayu Lab Technical Blog
channel.description: Writing about communications, signal processing, embedded systems, FPGA and computing fundamentals.

item.title: From Pixel Coordinates to a Safe Grasp: Five Boundaries in a Vision-Guided Arm
item.description: Uses the STM32 vision-arm project to explain why color detection, four-point calibration, inverse kinematics, robust serial transport and hardware safety need separate verification.

item.title: From Constellation to RTL: A Verifiable Order for Building a QPSK Link
item.description: A verification-first sequence for Gray mapping, phase rotation, hard decisions and BER alignment.

item.title: Non-Blocking STM32 Temperature Monitoring: From Sampling State Machines to Alarm Tasks
item.description: A dual-channel example covering non-blocking sampling, threshold management, alarm cadence, persistence and board bring-up.

item.title: FPGA DDS from Frequency Word to Measurement Display: A Verifiable Path
item.description: Layered design and verification for the phase accumulator, waveform LUT, sample-valid contract, statistics and board display.

item.title: MATLAB Modulation Recognition: Leakage-Free Data and Interpretable Features
item.description: A reliable workflow from signal generation and SNR injection through normalization, features and confusion-matrix analysis.

item.title: RRT and RRT* Beyond Animation: Collision Checks, Rewiring and Repeatable Tests
item.description: Turn a planning animation into a testable planner through step size, edge collision, goal connection and correct RRT* rewiring.

item.title: Five Decisions to Make Before Designing a Fixed-Point FPGA FFT
item.description: A design checklist covering width, scaling, twiddle factors, data order and streaming timing for fixed-point FFTs.

item.title: FreeRTOS Priority Is About Urgency, Not Importance
item.description: Design task priorities from deadlines, blocking relationships and resource contention rather than business labels.

item.title: Why MySQL Did Not Use the Index: A Structured Debugging Path
item.description: Diagnose missing index use through query shape, selectivity, type conversion, statistics and measured execution plans.
